description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Dinit on macos-latest-amd64 CI that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on workflow dispatch. Use a single macos-latest job that checks out the repository, verifies the g++ version, prints the g++ architecture, builds the project with make, prints the architecture of the dinit executive file, runs unit tests with make check, and runs integration tests with make check-igr.
